description_long: This is a compact, heavily-armored tracked combat vehicle with a boxy, angular structure and a prominent forward-facing cannon mounted on its upper front. The vehicle is painted in a dark green color with visible signs of wear, scratches, and metallic rivets along its panels, suggesting rugged use. Its lower section features robust metal tracks for all-terrain mobility, and the rear is equipped with two exhaust pipes angled outward. The sides display circular access panels and a large white 'X' marking, while the front and rear are reinforced with thick armor plating. The vehicle's design is utilitarian, with minimal external ornamentation aside from a few metallic plates and bolts. The overall appearance is that of a small, tactical urban tank designed for maneuverability and protection in confined environments.
description: A compact, green, tracked combat vehicle with a forward cannon, heavy armor, and visible wear. Features include side markings, rear exhausts, and robust metal tracks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large cannon, thick frontal armor, and the vehicle's wide metal tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cannon's barrel, side access panels, exhaust pipes, and the white 'X' marking.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhaust pipes, flat armored back, and the continuation of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, side panels, and the 'X' marking.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the upper front; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, riveted steel armor plating; reinforced front and rear panels; sloped upper structure.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint with visible wear and metallic accents; no camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Large white 'X' symbol on both sides of the upper body; no other markings visible.
